SEARCH
Package com.example.abacus_app

Class StorageRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.abacus_app.StorageRepository
public class StorageRepository extends Object
Centralized data access layer for Firebase Storage media files. Responsible for uploading and retrieving event posters and QR codes.
Version:
1.1
Author:
Himesh

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StorageRepository()
    Initializes the Firebase Storage instance and root reference.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void>
    deleteImage(String path)
    Deletes a file from Firebase Storage.
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<android.net.Uri>
    getPosterUrl(String eventId)
    Retrieves the download URL for a specific event's poster.
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<android.net.Uri>
    getQRCodeUrl(String eventId)
    Retrieves the download URL for a specific event's QR code.
    com.google.firebase.storage.UploadTask
    uploadPoster(String eventId, android.net.Uri fileUri)
    Uploads an event poster image to Firebase Storage.
    com.google.firebase.storage.UploadTask
    uploadQRCode(String eventId, android.graphics.Bitmap bitmap)
    Uploads a generated QR code image to Firebase Storage.

  • Constructor Details

    • StorageRepository

      public StorageRepository()
      Initializes the Firebase Storage instance and root reference.

  • Method Details

    • uploadPoster

      public com.google.firebase.storage.UploadTask uploadPoster(String eventId, android.net.Uri fileUri)
      Uploads an event poster image to Firebase Storage. Path: posters/{eventId}.jpg
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique ID of the event.
      fileUri - The local Uri of the image to be uploaded.
      Returns:
      An UploadTask for monitoring the upload progress.

    • uploadQRCode

      public com.google.firebase.storage.UploadTask uploadQRCode(String eventId, android.graphics.Bitmap bitmap)
      Uploads a generated QR code image to Firebase Storage. Path: qrcodes/{eventId}.png
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique ID of the event.
      bitmap - The Bitmap image of the QR code to be uploaded.
      Returns:
      An UploadTask for monitoring the upload progress.

    • getPosterUrl

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<android.net.Uri> getPosterUrl(String eventId)
      Retrieves the download URL for a specific event's poster.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique ID of the event.
      Returns:
      A Task containing the Uri download URL.

    • getQRCodeUrl

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<android.net.Uri> getQRCodeUrl(String eventId)
      Retrieves the download URL for a specific event's QR code.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique ID of the event.
      Returns:
      A Task containing the Uri download URL.

    • deleteImage

      public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> deleteImage(String path)
      Deletes a file from Firebase Storage.
      Parameters:
      path - The full path of the file to delete (e.g., "posters/123.jpg").
      Returns:
      A Task indicating the result of the deletion.
